# ASK query, XML results.
endpoint: sparql_query
classification: spec-required
match_mode: structural-xml
description: ASK query returns boolean in valid SPARQL XML

=== request
GET /sparql?query=ASK%20%7B%20%3Fs%20%3Fp%20%3Fo%20%7D
Accept: application/sparql-results+xml

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/sparql-results+xml

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<sparql xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/sparql-results#">
  <head/>
  <boolean>false</boolean>
</sparql>
